title: I Release Scarcity and Allow Permanent Overflow
subtitle: An energy statement for shifting from waiting-for-overflow to living-in-overflow
excerpt: A two-minute energy statement for releasing the belief that overflow is temporary or reserved for certain months. The release names the waiting pattern; the allow opens to overflow as the permanent, natural state rather than the seasonal exception.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 63 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for the waiting-for-overflow pattern. The release names the belief that overflow is short-lived. The sense that money ease is seasonal, and that it hasn't quite arrived yet. The allow opens to overflow as already here, already the natural state.

I am ready to release all belief that overflow is temporary, seasonal, or waiting to arrive, and all scarcity thinking that keeps me at the edge of enough. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow permanent overflow as my natural daily state: steady, joyful, and constant no matter what month it is. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 63 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
